scores.correctness_notes: Accurately covers all supported bases, architectures, single-base, multi-base shorthand and explicit forms, cross-compilation, and architecture-independent builds. All core content matches gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor issues: 'riscv64' listed as a standalone platform under 'multiple architectures' (riscv64 is not in the gold standard's supported arch list); mentions CRAFT_PLATFORM env var and --platform flag which aren't in gold standard but may be real features; the 'multi-base explicit form' example uses riscv64 which isn't in the supported architectures list per gold standard.
